title: Saudi Crumble Pancakes
description: A delicious and rich breakfast recipe with a Saudi twist, featuring crumble toppings and yogurt sauce.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry and cut into squares.
In a small bowl, mix the rich honey and saudia dates.
Place a spoonful of the honey-date mixture onto each pastry square.
Fold the pastry squares in half to form triangles.
Place the triangles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the pancakes are baking, mix the plain yogurt with a spoon.
Top the pancakes with the yogurt mixture and crumble mix.
